text: If you have to abandon ship into cold water, what type of clothing preparation is best?

options.text: Strip down to minimal light clothing to swim faster
Put on extra layers of clothing, preferably with a waterproof layer on top
Wear wool clothing only without any footwear
Put on your heavy work boiler suit only

explanation: In cold water, survival depends on thermal insulation; wearing multiple layers of clothing, particularly a waterproof outer layer, helps trap heat and protects the skin from rapid cooling.
